zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Eyton於1185年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾艾頓 亞爾 維姆時，他的父親Peter De Eyton I36歲，母親Alice of Dover20歲。他於1240年11月與Lady Margery Matilda De Pedwardine在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1254年在英國史洛普爾艾姆德享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾巴洛福德聖 托馬希也 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William De Eyton于1185年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾艾頓 亞爾 維姆时，他的父亲Peter De Eyton I36岁，母亲Alice of Dover20岁。他于1240年11月与Lady Margery Matilda De Pedwardine在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1254年在英国史洛普爾艾姆德享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾巴洛福德聖 托馬希也 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Eyton (Shrops) or Eaton (Cheshire, Leics, Staffs), or Eaton Bray (Beds), Cold Eaton or Long Eaton (Derbys).

variants.name: Ayton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Ayton (North Yorkshire) or Ayton (Berwickshire). The former is derived from Old Norse á ‘river, stream’ + tūn ‘farmstead’. The later takes its name from the River Eye (likely from Old English ēa ‘river, stream’) + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Eyton was born in 1185, in Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Peter De Eyton I, was 36 and his mother, Alice of Dover, was 20. He married Lady Margery Matilda De Pedwardine in November 1240, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1254, in Edgmond, Shropshire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in St Thomas' Cemetery, Barrowford, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William De Eyton est né en 1185, à Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Peter De Eyton I, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alice of Dover, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margery Matilda De Pedwardine en novembre 1240, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1254, à Edgmond, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à St Thomas' Cemetery, Barrowford, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William De Eyton 1185 in Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter De Eyton I 36 und seine Mutter Alice of Dover 20. Er hat im November 1240 in Shropshire, England Lady Margery Matilda De Pedwardine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1254 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Edgmond, Shropshire, England und wurde in St Thomas' Cemetery, Barrowford, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: William De Eytonが1185年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアエイトン ネアル ウエムで生まれた時，父Peter De Eyton Iは36歳，母Alice of Doverは20歳であった。1240年11月にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでLady Margery Matilda De Pedwardineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1254年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアエドグモンドで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアバーロウフォードスト ソマス' セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Thomas'S, Ardwick, Lancashire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 배로우퍼드 스트 톰아스' 세멧리

ko.Eyton, Shropshire, , England: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 이턴 니아어 w
ko.lifeSummary: William De Eyton(이)가 1185년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 이턴 니아어 w에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter De Eyton I(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice of Dover(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1240년 11월 영국 슈럽실르에서 Lady Margery Matilda De Pedwardine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1254년 영국 슈럽실르 에지몽에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 배로우퍼드 스트 톰아스' 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William De Eyton nasceu em 1185, em Eyton near Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Peter De Eyton I, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alice of Dover, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margery Matilda De Pedwardine em novembro de 1240, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1254, em Edgmond, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em St Thomas' Cemetery, Barrowford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Eyton родился в 1185 г. в местности эитон нир вем, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Peter De Eyton I было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice of Dover, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margery Matilda De Pedwardine ноябрь 1240 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1254 г. в местности эджмонд, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности ст томас' кеметири, барроуфорд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lady Margery Matilda De Pedwardine en noviembre de 1240, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos.
